                  app_MS1826SetUserOsdStringEnable PROC
;;;1879   
;;;1880   void app_MS1826SetUserOsdStringEnable(u8 u8Dev,u8 u8Rx, bool bEnable)

;;;1912   
;;;1913   void app_MS1826SplicerConfig(u8 u8Dev,u8 u8PortID,u16 u16X,u16 u16Y,u16 u16W,u16 u16H)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;1914   {

000034  8072              STRH     r2,[r6,#2]

                  app_MS1826SplitConfig PROC

                          AREA ||i.app_MS1826StandbyProcess||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_MS1826StandbyProcess PROC
;;;2343   
;;;2344   void app_MS1826StandbyProcess(u8 u8Dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;2345   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;2346       if(g_bPreMS1826SStbFlag[u8Dev] != sg_bMS1826StandbyFlag[u8Dev])
000004  4839              LDR      r0,|L25.236|
000006  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
000008  4939              LDR      r1,|L25.240|
00000a  5d49              LDRB     r1,[r1,r5]
00000c  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00000e  d06b              BEQ      |L25.232|
;;;2347       {
;;;2348           u8 i;
;;;2349           if(sg_bMS1826StandbyFlag[u8Dev])
000010  4837              LDR      r0,|L25.240|
000012  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
000014  b358              CBZ      r0,|L25.110|
;;;2350           {
;;;2351               for(i=0;i<4;i++)
000016  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000018  e026              B        |L25.104|
                  |L25.26|
;;;2352               {
;;;2353                   app_ms1826_tx_output_enable(u8Dev,i,FALSE);
00001a  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
00001c  4621              MOV      r1,r4
00001e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000020  f7fffffe          BL       app_ms1826_tx_output_enable
;;;2354                   if(g_bDigitalAudioSwByHdmiTx[u8Dev][i])
000024  4833              LDR      r0,|L25.244|
000026  eb000085          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #2
00002a  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00002c  b160              CBZ      r0,|L25.72|
;;;2355                       g_stMs1826Event[u8Dev].u8TxDigitalAudioSource[i] = u8_Tx_audio_sel[u8Dev][i];
00002e  4832              LDR      r0,|L25.248|
000030  eb000085          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #2
000034  5d01              LDRB     r1,[r0,r4]
000036  f24020f7          MOV      r0,#0x2f7
00003a  4368              MULS     r0,r5,r0
00003c  4a2f              LDR      r2,|L25.252|
00003e  eb020040          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #1
000042  f2004063          ADD      r0,r0,#0x463
000046  5501              STRB     r1,[r0,r4]
                  |L25.72|
;;;2356                   app_ms1826_audio_output_mute(u8Dev,g_stMs1826Event[u8Dev].u8TxDigitalAudioSource[i],i,TRUE);
000048  f24020f7          MOV      r0,#0x2f7
00004c  4368              MULS     r0,r5,r0
00004e  4a2b              LDR      r2,|L25.252|
000050  eb020040          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #1
000054  f2004063          ADD      r0,r0,#0x463
000058  5d01              LDRB     r1,[r0,r4]
00005a  2301              MOVS     r3,#1
00005c  4622              MOV      r2,r4
00005e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000060  f7fffffe          BL       app_ms1826_audio_output_mute
000064  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;2351
000066  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;2351
                  |L25.104|
000068  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;2351
00006a  dbd6              BLT      |L25.26|
00006c  e037              B        |L25.222|
                  |L25.110|
;;;2357               }
;;;2358           }
;;;2359           else
;;;2360           {
;;;2361               for(i=0;i<4;i++)
00006e  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000070  e033              B        |L25.218|
                  |L25.114|
;;;2362               {
;;;2363                   app_ms1826_tx_output_enable(u8Dev,i,TRUE);
000072  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000074  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000076  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000078  f7fffffe          BL       app_ms1826_tx_output_enable
;;;2364                   if(g_bDigitalAudioSwByHdmiTx[u8Dev][i])
00007c  481d              LDR      r0,|L25.244|
00007e  eb000085          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #2
000082  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000084  b160              CBZ      r0,|L25.160|
;;;2365                       g_stMs1826Event[u8Dev].u8TxDigitalAudioSource[i] = u8_Tx_audio_sel[u8Dev][i];
000086  481c              LDR      r0,|L25.248|
000088  eb000085          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #2
00008c  5d01              LDRB     r1,[r0,r4]
00008e  f24020f7          MOV      r0,#0x2f7
000092  4368              MULS     r0,r5,r0
000094  4a19              LDR      r2,|L25.252|
000096  eb020040          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #1
00009a  f2004063          ADD      r0,r0,#0x463
00009e  5501              STRB     r1,[r0,r4]
                  |L25.160|
;;;2366                   app_ms1826_audio_output_mute(u8Dev,g_stMs1826Event[u8Dev].u8TxDigitalAudioSource[i],i,g_stMs1826Event[u8Dev].u8TxDigitalAudioSta[i]?TRUE:FALSE);

0000b2  b108              CBZ      r0,|L25.184|
0000b4  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
0000b6  e000              B        |L25.186|
                  |L25.184|
0000b8  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L25.186|
0000ba  4603              MOV      r3,r0
0000bc  f24020f7          MOV      r0,#0x2f7

0000c8  f2004063          ADD      r0,r0,#0x463

0000ce  4622              MOV      r2,r4
0000d0  4628              MOV      r0,r5

0000dc  dbc9              BLT      |L25.114|
                  |L25.222|
;;;2367               }
;;;2368           }
;;;2369           g_bPreMS1826SStbFlag[u8Dev] = sg_bMS1826StandbyFlag[u8Dev];

                  app_MS1826SwFreezeTimer PROC
;;;1741   
;;;1742   void app_MS1826SwFreezeTimer(u8 u8Dev)
000000  f24021f7          MOV      r1,#0x2f7
;;;1743   {

00000c  f8b11440          LDRH     r1,[r1,#0x440]
000010  b309              CBZ      r1,|L26.86|

;;;1746           g_stMs1826Event[u8Dev].u16FreezeDelayTime--;

00001c  f8b11440          LDRH     r1,[r1,#0x440]
000020  1e49              SUBS     r1,r1,#1

00002a  4b0b              LDR      r3,|L26.88|

000030  f8a12440          STRH     r2,[r1,#0x440]
;;;1747           if(g_stMs1826Event[u8Dev].u16FreezeDelayTime==0)
000034  f24021f7          MOV      r1,#0x2f7
000038  4341              MULS     r1,r0,r1
00003a  461a              MOV      r2,r3
00003c  eb020141          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #1

000044  b939              CBNZ     r1,|L26.86|

;;;1749               g_stMs1826Event[u8Dev].bFreezeTimeEnd = TRUE;

00004c  4341              MULS     r1,r0,r1
00004e  eb030141          ADD      r1,r3,r1,LSL #1
000052  f8812442          STRB     r2,[r1,#0x442]
                  |L26.86|
;;;1750           }
;;;1751       }
;;;1752   }

;;;1753

                          ENDP

                  |L37.52|
                          DCD      g_stMs1826Event

                          AREA ||i.app_bcsh_adjust||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_bcsh_adjust PROC
;;;666    
;;;667    VOID app_bcsh_adjust(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_vehc_idx)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;668    {
;;;669    	if(u8_vehc_idx < VEHC_VIPSS_1)
000002  2904              CMP      r1,#4
000004  da48              BGE      |L38.152|
;;;670    	{
;;;671    //		api_vehc_instance_init(&g_st_vovehc[u8_vehc_idx], u8_vehc_idx);
;;;672    		if(CHIP_INTERNAL_PROCESS_COLORSPACE == HDMI_COLORSPACE_RGB)
;;;673    		{
;;;674    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].u8_vehc_idx = u8_vehc_idx;
;;;675    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].b_yuv = MS_FALSE;
;;;676    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.u8_bcsh_en_flag = BRI_EN | CON_EN;
;;;677    
;;;678    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.s8_bcsh_bri = g_u8_bcsh_bri[u8_vehc_idx]-128;
;;;679    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.u8_bcsh_con = g_u8_bcsh_con[u8_vehc_idx];
;;;680    		}
;;;681    		else
;;;682    		{
;;;683    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].b_yuv = MS_TRUE;
000006  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000008  eb000340          ADD      r3,r0,r0,LSL #1
00000c  4c4d              LDR      r4,|L38.324|
00000e  eb041303          ADD      r3,r4,r3,LSL #4
000012  eb010441          ADD      r4,r1,r1,LSL #1

00001a  705a              STRB     r2,[r3,#1]
;;;684    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.u8_bcsh_en_flag = BRI_EN | CON_EN | SAT_EN | HUE_EN;

00001e  eb000340          ADD      r3,r0,r0,LSL #1
000022  4c48              LDR      r4,|L38.324|

000028  eb010441          ADD      r4,r1,r1,LSL #1
00002c  eb030384          ADD      r3,r3,r4,LSL #2
000030  709a              STRB     r2,[r3,#2]
;;;685    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.s8_bcsh_bri = g_u8_bcsh_bri[u8_vehc_idx] - 128;
000032  4a45              LDR      r2,|L38.328|
000034  5c52              LDRB     r2,[r2,r1]
000036  3a80              SUBS     r2,r2,#0x80
000038  b253              SXTB     r3,r2
00003a  eb000240          ADD      r2,r0,r0,LSL #1
00003e  4c41              LDR      r4,|L38.324|

00004c  70d3              STRB     r3,[r2,#3]
;;;686    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.u8_bcsh_con = g_u8_bcsh_con[u8_vehc_idx];

000050  5c53              LDRB     r3,[r2,r1]
000052  eb000240          ADD      r2,r0,r0,LSL #1

00005c  eb010441          ADD      r4,r1,r1,LSL #1
000060  eb020284          ADD      r2,r2,r4,LSL #2
000064  7113              STRB     r3,[r2,#4]
;;;687    			g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.u8_bcsh_sat = g_u8_bcsh_sat[u8_vehc_idx];

;;;692    	}
;;;693    
;;;694    	else if(u8_vehc_idx < VEHC_NUM)

;;;695    	{
;;;696    		u8_vehc_idx = u8_vehc_idx % 4;

;;;698    		if(CHIP_INTERNAL_PROCESS_COLORSPACE == HDMI_COLORSPACE_RGB)
;;;699    		{
;;;700    			g_st_vivehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].u8_vehc_idx = u8_vehc_idx+VEHC_VIPSS_1;

;;;702    			g_st_vivehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.u8_bcsh_en_flag = BRI_EN | CON_EN;
;;;703    			g_st_vivehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.s8_bcsh_bri = g_u8_bcsh_bri[u8_vehc_idx]-128;
;;;704    			g_st_vivehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.u8_bcsh_con = g_u8_bcsh_con[u8_vehc_idx];
;;;705    		}
;;;706    		else
;;;707    		{

0000d6  709a              STRB     r2,[r3,#2]
;;;710    			g_st_vivehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_bcsh.s8_bcsh_bri = g_u8_bcsh_bri[u8_vehc_idx] - 128;

                  app_digital_audio_cfg PROC
;;;415    
;;;416    VOID app_digital_audio_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_audio_src, UINT8 u8_digital_audio_id, BOOL b_status)
000000  e92d41ff          PUSH     {r0-r8,lr}
;;;417    {

                  app_digital_input_hdmi_output_cfg PROC
;;;590    
;;;591    VOID app_digital_input_hdmi_output_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 g_u8_digital_idx,UINT8 u8_tx)
000000  b5f0              PUSH     {r4-r7,lr}
;;;592    {
000002  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0

000008  4614              MOV      r4,r2
;;;593    	MISC_TX_AUDIO_SEL st_misc_tx_audio_sel;
;;;594    	MISC_DIGITAL_AUDIO_CFG g_st_misc_digital_audio_cfg;
;;;595    	MISC_MCLK_CFG_T g_st_misc_mclk_cfg;
;;;596    	UINT8 u8_digital_audio_dst;

;;;600    	if(g_u8_digital_idx == I2S1_AUDIO)

000016  d10f              BNE      |L40.56|
;;;601    	{
;;;602    		g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx].u8_audio_src = FROM_I2S_PAD;

000034  7148              STRB     r0,[r1,#5]
000036  e07c              B        |L40.306|
                  |L40.56|
;;;603    	}
;;;604    	else if(g_u8_digital_idx == SPIDF1_AUDIO)

00003a  d10f              BNE      |L40.92|
;;;605    	{

                  |L40.92|
;;;607    	}
;;;608    	else if(g_u8_digital_idx == I2S2_AUDIO)

;;;609    	{

;;;611    	}

                  |L40.164|

;;;616    	else if(g_u8_digital_idx == I2S3_AUDIO)

;;;617    	{

0000c4  7148              STRB     r0,[r1,#5]

                  |L40.200|
;;;619    	}
;;;620    	else if(g_u8_digital_idx == SPIDF3_AUDIO)
0000c8  2e09              CMP      r6,#9
0000ca  d10f              BNE      |L40.236|
;;;621    	{
;;;622    		g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx].u8_audio_src = FROM_SPDIF_PAD;

0000ce  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1

                  app_mode_switch_cfg PROC
;;;534    
;;;535    VOID app_mode_switch_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8Mode,UINT8 u8SubMode)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;536    {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4617              MOV      r7,r2
;;;537    	UINT8 u8_i;

00000e  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]
;;;540        sys_show_osd(u8Dev,g_bOSDShown[u8Dev], 0x0F);

000012  5d01              LDRB     r1,[r0,r4]

000016  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000018  f7fffffe          BL       sys_show_osd

00001e  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000020  4947              LDR      r1,|L43.320|
000022  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]
;;;542        g_u8_display_mode[u8Dev] = u8Mode;
000024  4845              LDR      r0,|L43.316|
000026  5506              STRB     r6,[r0,r4]
;;;543        switch (g_u8_display_mode[u8Dev])
000028  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00002a  2805              CMP      r0,#5
00002c  d27f              BCS      |L43.302|
00002e  e8dff000          TBB      [pc,r0]
000032  0320              DCB      0x03,0x20
000034  38603900          DCB      0x38,0x60,0x39,0x00

;;;545            case MS1826_VIDEO_SPLITTER:
;;;546                g_st_app_splitter_dev[u8Dev].b_splitter_sw = MS_TRUE;

;;;547                g_st_app_splitter_dev[u8Dev].u8_splitter_mode = u8SubMode;

00004c  f8017020          STRB     r7,[r1,r0,LSL #2]
;;;548                app_splitter_mode_config(u8Dev,&g_st_app_splitter_dev[u8Dev]);

000054  eb020180          ADD      r1,r2,r0,LSL #2
000058  4620              MOV      r0,r4

;;;549                for(u8_i = 0; u8_i < 4; u8_i ++)
00005e  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000060  e001              B        |L43.102|
                  |L43.98|
000062  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1
000064  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0
                  |L43.102|
000066  2d04              CMP      r5,#4
000068  dbfb              BLT      |L43.98|
;;;550                {
;;;551                    if(g_u8_HDMI_TX_PROT[g_st_app_splitter_dev[u8Dev].u8_dst_sel] != g_u8_HDMI_TX_PROT[u8_i])
;;;552                    {
;;;553                        //switch_bypass_channel(u8Dev,Matrix_Tx_Mapping[u8Dev][u8_i], u8_i);
;;;554                    }
;;;555                }
;;;556    			LOG("[INFO] MS1826 function is VIDEO_SPLITTER.");
00006a  a037              ADR      r0,|L43.328|
00006c  f7fffffe          BL       ms1826_printf
;;;557                break;
000070  e05e              B        |L43.304|
;;;558            case MS1826_VIDEO_SPLICER:

;;;574                break;

;;;577                {
;;;578                    if(Bypass_Tx_Status[u8Dev][u8_i] == 0)

;;;583                }
;;;584    			LOG("[INFO] MS1826 function is BYPASS_MATRIX_SWITCHER.");
000122  e000              B        |L43.294|
000124  e003              B        |L43.302|
                  |L43.294|

;;;585                break;

                  |L43.302|
;;;586            default:
;;;587                break;

                  |L43.304|

;;;588        }
;;;589    }

                  app_ms1826_colortemp_adjust PROC
;;;847    
;;;848    void app_ms1826_colortemp_adjust(UINT8 u8Dev,BOOL b_en,UINT8 u8_vehc_idx, UINT8 u8_r_gain, UINT8 u8_g_gain, UINT8 u8_b_gain)

000026  e001              B        |L47.44|
                  |L47.40|
;;;854    //        api_vehc_instance_init(&g_st_vovehc[u8_vehc_idx], u8_vehc_idx);
;;;855    
;;;856        }
;;;857    #if 0
;;;858        else if(u8_vehc_idx < VEHC_NUM)
;;;859        {
;;;860    		u8_vehc_idx = u8_vehc_idx % 4;
;;;861            g_st_vovehc[0].u8_vehc_idx = u8_vehc_idx;
;;;862            api_vehc_instance_init(&g_st_vovehc[0], u8_vehc_idx);

;;;864    #endif
;;;865        else
;;;866            return;
;;;867    
;;;868        l_st_vodyn.b_en = b_en;
;;;869        l_st_vodyn.u8_dyn_vr_gain = u8_r_gain;

;;;876    }

                  |L47.44|
00002c  f88d6000          STRB     r6,[sp,#0]            ;868
000030  f88d7001          STRB     r7,[sp,#1]            ;869
000034  f88d8003          STRB     r8,[sp,#3]            ;870
000038  f88d9002          STRB     r9,[sp,#2]            ;871
00003c  f24030ff          MOV      r0,#0x3ff             ;872
000040  f8ad0004          STRH     r0,[sp,#4]            ;872
000044  f8ad0008          STRH     r0,[sp,#8]            ;873
000048  f8ad0006          STRH     r0,[sp,#6]            ;874
00004c  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1       ;875
000050  4a05              LDR      r2,|L47.104|

                  app_ms1826_get_display_horizontal PROC
;;;1257   
;;;1258   UINT16 app_ms1826_get_display_horizontal(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8TxID)
000000  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;1259   {
;;;1260       return g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8TxID].u16_hactive;
000002  eb020042          ADD      r0,r2,r2,LSL #1
000006  eb0000c2          ADD      r0,r0,r2,LSL #3
00000a  4b05              LDR      r3,|L51.32|

000010  eb010341          ADD      r3,r1,r1,LSL #1

                  |L55.482|

                  |L55.484|

000202  d21b              BCS      |L55.572|

;;;1434           case ProgrVNegHNeg:

                          AREA ||i.app_ms1826_get_tx_edid_data||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_ms1826_get_tx_edid_data PROC
;;;1456   
;;;1457   void app_ms1826_get_tx_edid_data(u8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_tx,UINT8* pu8_edidbuf)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1458   {

000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
000006  4616              MOV      r6,r2
;;;1459       if(g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx].pu8_edid_buf != NULL)

000010  4912              LDR      r1,|L56.92|

000022  68c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0xc]

;;;1460       {
;;;1461           memcpy(pu8_edidbuf,g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx].pu8_edid_buf,256);

00002a  ebc01044          RSB      r0,r0,r4,LSL #5
00002e  4a0b              LDR      r2,|L56.92|

000048  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
00004c  e004              B        |L56.88|
                  |L56.78|
;;;1462       }
;;;1463       else
;;;1464           memset(pu8_edidbuf,0,256);
00004e  f44f7180          MOV      r1,#0x100
000052  4630              MOV      r0,r6
000054  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memclr
                  |L56.88|
;;;1465   }
000058  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1466   
                          ENDP

00005a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L56.92|

                          AREA ||i.app_ms1826_get_tx_hpd_sta||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_ms1826_get_tx_hpd_sta PROC
;;;1403   
;;;1404   UINT8 app_ms1826_get_tx_hpd_sta(u8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_tx)
000000  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;1405   {
;;;1406       return b_hpd_bak[u8Dev][u8_tx]?1:0;

000008  5c40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r1]

00000c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L57.14|
;;;1407   }
00000e  4770              BX       lr
                  |L57.16|

                          AREA ||i.app_ms1826_peaking_adjust||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_ms1826_peaking_adjust PROC
;;;1616   
;;;1617   void app_ms1826_peaking_adjust(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_vehc_idx,UINT8 u8_value,u8 u8_adjust_mode)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1618   {
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000008  4616              MOV      r6,r2
00000a  461f              MOV      r7,r3
;;;1619       if(u8_vehc_idx < VEHC_VIPSS_1)
00000c  2c04              CMP      r4,#4
00000e  da4c              BGE      |L60.170|
;;;1620       {
;;;1621           g_st_vovehc[u8Dev][u8_vehc_idx].st_peaking.b_pk_en = MS_TRUE;
000010  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000012  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000016  4a57              LDR      r2,|L60.372|
000018  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4

                  app_ms1826_reg_read PROC
;;;1693   
;;;1694   void app_ms1826_reg_read(u8 u8Dev,u16 u16AddrOffect,u8 *u8RVal)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1695   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4615              MOV      r5,r2
;;;1696       u8 l_u8OldDev = g_u8MS1826_I2CDevID;
00000a  4808              LDR      r0,|L62.44|
00000c  7807              LDRB     r7,[r0,#0]  ; g_u8MS1826_I2CDevID
;;;1697       g_u8MS1826_I2CDevID = (u8)cg_stMs1826DevCfgTable[u8Dev].u8I2cIndex;
00000e  4808              LDR      r0,|L62.48|
000010  f8100014          LDRB     r0,[r0,r4,LSL #1]
000014  4905              LDR      r1,|L62.44|
000016  7008              STRB     r0,[r1,#0]
;;;1698       *u8RVal = mculib_i2c_read_16bidx8bval(gu8ChipAddr[u8Dev],u16AddrOffect);
000018  4906              LDR      r1,|L62.52|
00001a  5d08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r4]
00001c  4631              MOV      r1,r6
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       mculib_i2c_read_16bidx8bval
000022  7028              STRB     r0,[r5,#0]
;;;1699       g_u8MS1826_I2CDevID = l_u8OldDev;
000024  4801              LDR      r0,|L62.44|
000026  7007              STRB     r7,[r0,#0]
;;;1700   }
000028  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;1701   
                          ENDP

                  app_ms1826_reg_write PROC
;;;1701   
;;;1702   void app_ms1826_reg_write(u8 u8Dev,u16 u16AddrOffect,u8 u8RVal)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}

00001e  4629              MOV      r1,r5

000028  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}

                          AREA ||i.app_ms1826_set_splitter_mode||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_ms1826_set_splitter_mode PROC
;;;1662   
;;;1663   void app_ms1826_set_splitter_mode(u8 u8Dev,u8 u8Mode)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1664   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;1665   #if 1
;;;1666       if(u8Mode==0)
000006  b985              CBNZ     r5,|L66.42|
;;;1667       {
;;;1668           if(g_u8_display_mode[u8Dev]!=cg_stMs1826DevCfgTable[u8Dev].u8WorkMode)
000008  4816              LDR      r0,|L66.100|
00000a  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00000c  4916              LDR      r1,|L66.104|
00000e  eb010144          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #1
000012  7849              LDRB     r1,[r1,#1]
000014  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000016  d024              BEQ      |L66.98|
;;;1669           {
;;;1670               //app_display_mode_cfg(u8Dev,cg_stMs1826DevCfgTable[u8Dev].u8WorkMode,0);
;;;1671               app_mode_switch_cfg(u8Dev,cg_stMs1826DevCfgTable[u8Dev].u8WorkMode,0);
000018  4813              LDR      r0,|L66.104|
00001a  eb000044          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #1
00001e  7841              LDRB     r1,[r0,#1]
000020  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000022  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000024  f7fffffe          BL       app_mode_switch_cfg
000028  e01b              B        |L66.98|
                  |L66.42|
;;;1672           }
;;;1673       }
;;;1674       else
;;;1675       {
;;;1676           if(g_u8_display_mode[u8Dev]==MS1826_VIDEO_SPLITTER)
00002a  480e              LDR      r0,|L66.100|
00002c  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00002e  b998              CBNZ     r0,|L66.88|
;;;1677           {
;;;1678               g_st_app_splitter_dev[u8Dev].b_splitter_sw = MS_TRUE;

000032  eb041144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #5
000036  4a0d              LDR      r2,|L66.108|

00003c  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;1679               g_st_app_splitter_dev[u8Dev].u8_splitter_mode = u8Mode;
00003e  eb041044          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #5
000042  4611              MOV      r1,r2
000044  f8015020          STRB     r5,[r1,r0,LSL #2]
;;;1680               app_splitter_mode_config(u8Dev,&g_st_app_splitter_dev[u8Dev]);
000048  eb041044          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #5
00004c  eb020180          ADD      r1,r2,r0,LSL #2
000050  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000052  f7fffffe          BL       app_splitter_mode_config
000056  e004              B        |L66.98|
                  |L66.88|
;;;1681           }
;;;1682           else
;;;1683           {
;;;1684               //app_display_mode_cfg(u8Dev,MS1826_VIDEO_SPLITTER,u8Mode);
;;;1685               app_mode_switch_cfg(u8Dev,MS1826_VIDEO_SPLITTER,u8Mode);

00005e  f7fffffe          BL       app_mode_switch_cfg
                  |L66.98|
;;;1686           }
;;;1687       }
;;;1688   #else
;;;1689       extern void app_single_user_splitter_mode_test(void);
;;;1690       app_single_user_splitter_mode_test();
;;;1691   #endif
;;;1692   }
000062  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1693   
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.app_ms1826_set_user_string_color||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_ms1826_set_user_string_color PROC
;;;1532   
;;;1533   void app_ms1826_set_user_string_color(u8 u8Dev,u8 u8Rx,u8 u8R,u8 u8G,u8 u8B)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1534   {
000002  9c04              LDR      r4,[sp,#0x10]
;;;1535       g_user_osd_string_color[u8Dev][u8Rx][0] = u8R;
000004  eb000540          ADD      r5,r0,r0,LSL #1
000008  4e0e              LDR      r6,|L67.68|
00000a  eb060585          ADD      r5,r6,r5,LSL #2
00000e  eb010641          ADD      r6,r1,r1,LSL #1
000012  55aa              STRB     r2,[r5,r6]
;;;1536       g_user_osd_string_color[u8Dev][u8Rx][1] = u8G;
000014  eb000540          ADD      r5,r0,r0,LSL #1
000018  4e0a              LDR      r6,|L67.68|
00001a  eb060585          ADD      r5,r6,r5,LSL #2
00001e  eb010641          ADD      r6,r1,r1,LSL #1
000022  4435              ADD      r5,r5,r6
000024  706b              STRB     r3,[r5,#1]
;;;1537       g_user_osd_string_color[u8Dev][u8Rx][2] = u8B;
000026  eb000540          ADD      r5,r0,r0,LSL #1
00002a  4e06              LDR      r6,|L67.68|
00002c  eb060585          ADD      r5,r6,r5,LSL #2
000030  eb010641          ADD      r6,r1,r1,LSL #1
000034  4435              ADD      r5,r5,r6
000036  70ac              STRB     r4,[r5,#2]
;;;1538   
;;;1539       g_bUserOsdStringDisplayEnable[u8Dev][u8Rx] = TRUE;
000038  2501              MOVS     r5,#1
00003a  4e03              LDR      r6,|L67.72|
00003c  eb060680          ADD      r6,r6,r0,LSL #2
000040  5475              STRB     r5,[r6,r1]
;;;1540   //    if(g_user_osd_str_enable[u8Dev][u8Rx])
;;;1541   //    {
;;;1542   //        g_bOSDShown[u8Dev] = MS_TRUE;
;;;1543   //        sys_show_osd(u8Dev,g_bOSDShown[u8Dev], (1<<u8Rx));
;;;1544   //        g_u8_time = 3;
;;;1545   //    }
;;;1546   }
000042  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1547   
                          ENDP

                  |L67.68|
                          DCD      g_user_osd_string_color
                  |L67.72|
                          DCD      g_bUserOsdStringDisplayEnable

                          AREA ||i.app_ms1826_set_user_string_position||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  app_ms1826_set_user_string_position PROC
;;;1547   
;;;1548   void app_ms1826_set_user_string_position(u8 u8Dev,u8 u8Rx,u16 u16X,u16 u16Y)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}

;;;1550       g_u16UserStrDispPos[u8Dev][u8Rx][0] = u16X;

000008  f8242021          STRH     r2,[r4,r1,LSL #2]
;;;1551       g_u16UserStrDispPos[u8Dev][u8Rx][1] = u16Y;

00000e  eb041400          ADD      r4,r4,r0,LSL #4
000012  eb040481          ADD      r4,r4,r1,LSL #2
000016  8063              STRH     r3,[r4,#2]

00001a  4d03              LDR      r5,|L68.40|

000020  546c              STRB     r4,[r5,r1]

;;;1555   //    {

                  app_ms1826_tx_timing_config PROC

;;;1148   void app_ms1826_tx_timing_config(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8TxID,pstTimingTable_t pstTiming)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}

                  app_tx_audio_cfg PROC
;;;437    
;;;438    VOID app_tx_audio_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8	u8_audio_src, UINT8 u8_tx)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;439    {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000004  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000006  4614              MOV      r4,r2
;;;440    	MISC_TX_AUDIO_SEL st_misc_tx_audio_sel;
;;;441        LOG("app_tx_audio_cfg tx%d audio source %d\r\n",u8_tx,u8_audio_src);
000008  4632              MOV      r2,r6
00000a  4621              MOV      r1,r4
00000c  a046              ADR      r0,|L79.296|
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       ms1826_printf
;;;442        LOG("g_st_hdmi_tx %d audio source %d\r\n",u8_tx,g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx].u8_audio_src);
000012  eb050045          ADD      r0,r5,r5,LSL #1
000016  ebc01045          RSB      r0,r0,r5,LSL #5
00001a  494d              LDR      r1,|L79.336|
00001c  eb011000          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #4
000020  eb040144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #1
000024  ebc11144          RSB      r1,r1,r4,LSL #5
000028  eb000081          ADD      r0,r0,r1,LSL #2
00002c  7942              LDRB     r2,[r0,#5]
00002e  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000030  a048              ADR      r0,|L79.340|
000032  f7fffffe          BL       ms1826_printf
;;;443    	u8_Tx_audio_sel[u8Dev][u8_tx] = u8_audio_src;
000036  4850              LDR      r0,|L79.376|
000038  eb000085          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #2
00003c  5506              STRB     r6,[r0,r4]
;;;444        if(g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx].u8_audio_src == FROM_HDMI_RX_AUDIO)
00003e  eb050045          ADD      r0,r5,r5,LSL #1
000042  ebc01045          RSB      r0,r0,r5,LSL #5
000046  4942              LDR      r1,|L79.336|
000048  eb011000          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #4
00004c  eb040144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #1

000054  eb000081          ADD      r0,r0,r1,LSL #2

00005c  d163              BNE      |L79.294|
;;;445        {
;;;446        	st_misc_tx_audio_sel.U8_tx_dst = g_u8_misc_module_tx[g_u8_HDMI_TX_PROT[u8_tx]];

000082  4a33              LDR      r2,|L79.336|

;;;451        	api_hdmi_tx_audio_change(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx]);
0000e2  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
0000e6  ebc11145          RSB      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
0000ea  4a19              LDR      r2,|L79.336|

;;;452        	api_hdmi_tx_audio_mute(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx], b_audio_mute[u8Dev][u8_tx]);
000100  eb050245          ADD      r2,r5,r5,LSL #1
000104  ebc21245          RSB      r2,r2,r5,LSL #5

000120  5d11              LDRB     r1,[r2,r4]
000122  f7fffffe          BL       api_hdmi_tx_audio_mute
                  |L79.294|
;;;453        }
;;;454    //	app_digital_audio_cfg(u8_audio_src, g_u8_i2s_idx[u8_tx], b_digital_audio_mute[u8Dev][u8_tx]?FALSE:TRUE);
;;;455    //	app_digital_audio_cfg(u8_audio_src, g_u8_spdif_idx[u8_tx], b_digital_audio_mute[u8Dev][u8_tx]?FALSE:TRUE);
;;;456    }
000126  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;457    
                          ENDP

                          DCD      b_audio_mute

                          AREA ||i.app_video_vipss_trig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  app_video_vipss_trig PROC
;;;394    
;;;395    VOID app_video_vipss_trig(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8	u8_vipss_sel)
000000  b57c              PUSH     {r2-r6,lr}
;;;396    {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;397    	SS_DEV_T st_split_vipss_ss_dev;
;;;398    
;;;399    	st_split_vipss_ss_dev.u8_sel = u8_vipss_sel;
000006  f88d5000          STRB     r5,[sp,#0]
;;;400    	st_split_vipss_ss_dev.u8_vipss_trigger_mode	= FORCE_TRIGGER;
00000a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00000c  f88d0004          STRB     r0,[sp,#4]
;;;401    	api_ss_vipss_trig(&st_split_vipss_ss_dev);
000010  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000012  f7fffffe          BL       api_ss_vipss_trig

000016  bf00              NOP      
;;;403    }
000018  bd7c              POP      {r2-r6,pc}

                  app_video_vopss_trig PROC

                          AREA ||i.ms1826_printf||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                          REQUIRE _printf_percent
                          REQUIRE _printf_return_value
                          REQUIRE _printf_d
                          REQUIRE _printf_int_dec
                  ms1826_printf PROC
;;;2372   
;;;2373   int ms1826_printf(const char *fmt, ...)
000000  b40f              PUSH     {r0-r3}
;;;2374   {
000002  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
000004  f5ad6d81          SUB      sp,sp,#0x408
;;;2375       int                 i,iret;
;;;2376       char                szPrint[1024];
;;;2377       va_list             ap;
;;;2378       pstUartDeclare_t    pstUart = (pstUartDeclare_t)&stProjectUartWorkTable[0];
000008  4c31              LDR      r4,|L82.208|
;;;2379   
;;;2380       if(!g_bEnableDbgFlag)
00000a  4832              LDR      r0,|L82.212|
00000c  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; g_bEnableDbgFlag
00000e  b928              CBNZ     r0,|L82.28|
;;;2381           return 0;
000010  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L82.18|
;;;2382   
;;;2383       while(pstUart->u8UartPort != _UART_PORT_NONE)
;;;2384       {
;;;2385       #if (_DEBUG_PORT_SEL==_UART_PORT_1)
;;;2386           if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_1)
;;;2387       #elif (_DEBUG_PORT_SEL==_UART_PORT_2)
;;;2388           if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_2)
;;;2389       #elif (_DEBUG_PORT_SEL==_UART_PORT_3)
;;;2390           if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_3)
;;;2391       #elif (_DEBUG_PORT_SEL==_UART_PORT_4)
;;;2392           if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_4)
;;;2393       #elif (_DEBUG_PORT_SEL==_UART_PORT_5)
;;;2394           if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_5)
;;;2395       #elif (_DEBUG_PORT_SEL==_UART_PORT_6)
;;;2396           if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_6)
;;;2397       #else
;;;2398           if(pstUart->bIsDebugPort)
;;;2399       #endif
;;;2400           {
;;;2401               break;
;;;2402           }
;;;2403           pstUart ++;
;;;2404       }
;;;2405   
;;;2406       if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_NONE)
;;;2407       {
;;;2408           return 0;
;;;2409       }
;;;2410   #if _ENABLE_UART_SEMAPHORE_FUNCTION_BY_PRINT
;;;2411      #if _ENABLE_UART_1
;;;2412      if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_1)
;;;2413          Uart1_xSemaphoreTask();
;;;2414      else
;;;2415      #endif
;;;2416      #if _ENABLE_UART_2
;;;2417      if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_2)
;;;2418          Uart2_xSemaphoreTask();
;;;2419      else
;;;2420      #endif
;;;2421      #if _ENABLE_UART_3
;;;2422      if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_3)
;;;2423          Uart3_xSemaphoreTask();
;;;2424      else
;;;2425      #endif
;;;2426      #if _ENABLE_UART_4
;;;2427      if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_4)
;;;2428          Uart4_xSemaphoreTask();
;;;2429      else
;;;2430      #endif
;;;2431      #if _ENABLE_UART_5
;;;2432      if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_5)
;;;2433          Uart5_xSemaphoreTask();
;;;2434      else
;;;2435      #endif
;;;2436      #if _ENABLE_UART_6
;;;2437      if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_6)
;;;2438          Uart6_xSemaphoreTask();
;;;2439      else
;;;2440      #endif
;;;2441          UNUSED(pstUart);
;;;2442   #endif
;;;2443   
;;;2444       iret = sprintf((char*)szPrint,"Dev[%d]", g_u8MS1826DevIndex);
;;;2445       USARTx_send_bytes(pstUart, (uint8_t *)szPrint, iret);
;;;2446   
;;;2447       va_start(ap, fmt);
;;;2448   //    iret = vsnprintf(szPrint, PRINTF_CHAR_MAX, fmt, ap);
;;;2449       iret = Uart_vsnprintf(szPrint, 1024, fmt, ap);
;;;2450       va_end(ap);
;;;2451   
;;;2452   //    dbg_printf("Dev[%d]",g_u8MS1826DevIndex);
;;;2453   
;;;2454   
;;;2455       for (i = 0; i < iret; i++)
;;;2456       {
;;;2457   //        dbg_printf("%c",szPrint[i]);
;;;2458           USARTx_send_bytes(pstUart, (uint8_t *)&szPrint[i], 1);
;;;2459       }
;;;2460   
;;;2461   #if _ENABLE_UART_SEMAPHORE_FUNCTION_BY_PRINT
;;;2462       #if _ENABLE_UART_1
;;;2463       if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_1)
;;;2464           Uart1_xSemaphoreGive();
;;;2465       else
;;;2466       #endif
;;;2467       #if _ENABLE_UART_2
;;;2468       if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_2)
;;;2469           Uart2_xSemaphoreGive();
;;;2470       else
;;;2471       #endif
;;;2472       #if _ENABLE_UART_3
;;;2473       if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_3)
;;;2474           Uart3_xSemaphoreGive();
;;;2475       else
;;;2476       #endif
;;;2477       #if _ENABLE_UART_4
;;;2478       if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_4)
;;;2479           Uart4_xSemaphoreGive();
;;;2480       else
;;;2481       #endif
;;;2482       #if _ENABLE_UART_5
;;;2483       if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_5)
;;;2484           Uart5_xSemaphoreGive();
;;;2485       else
;;;2486       #endif
;;;2487       #if _ENABLE_UART_6
;;;2488       if(pstUart->u8UartPort == _UART_PORT_6)
;;;2489           Uart6_xSemaphoreGive();
;;;2490       else
;;;2491       #endif
;;;2492           UNUSED(pstUart);
;;;2493   #endif
;;;2494   
;;;2495       return iret;
;;;2496   }
000012  f50d6d81          ADD      sp,sp,#0x408
000016  bc70              POP      {r4-r6}
000018  f85dfb14          LDR      pc,[sp],#0x14
                  |L82.28|
00001c  e003              B        |L82.38|
                  |L82.30|
00001e  7d20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x14]         ;2398
000020  b100              CBZ      r0,|L82.36|
000022  e003              B        |L82.44|
                  |L82.36|
000024  3428              ADDS     r4,r4,#0x28           ;2403
                  |L82.38|
000026  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;2383
000028  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;2383
00002a  d1f8              BNE      |L82.30|
                  |L82.44|
00002c  bf00              NOP                            ;2401
00002e  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;2406
000030  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L82.54|
000032  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;2408
000034  e7ed              B        |L82.18|
                  |L82.54|
000036  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;2412
000038  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;2412
00003a  d102              BNE      |L82.66|
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       Uart1_xSemaphoreTask
000040  e00c              B        |L82.92|
                  |L82.66|
000042  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;2417
000044  2802              CMP      r0,#2                 ;2417
000046  d102              BNE      |L82.78|
000048  f7fffffe          BL       Uart2_xSemaphoreTask
00004c  e006              B        |L82.92|
                  |L82.78|
00004e  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;2422
000050  2803              CMP      r0,#3                 ;2422
000052  d102              BNE      |L82.90|
000054  f7fffffe          BL       Uart3_xSemaphoreTask
000058  e000              B        |L82.92|
                  |L82.90|
00005a  bf00              NOP                            ;2441
                  |L82.92|
00005c  481e              LDR      r0,|L82.216|
00005e  7802              LDRB     r2,[r0,#0]            ;2444  ; g_u8MS1826DevIndex
000060  a11e              ADR      r1,|L82.220|
000062  a802              ADD      r0,sp,#8              ;2444
000064  f7fffffe          BL       __2sprintf
000068  4606              MOV      r6,r0                 ;2444
00006a  b2b2              UXTH     r2,r6                 ;2445
00006c  a902              ADD      r1,sp,#8              ;2445
00006e  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;2445
000070  f7fffffe          BL       USARTx_send_bytes
000074  f20d401c          ADD      r0,sp,#0x41c          ;2447
000078  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]            ;2447
00007a  f44f6180          MOV      r1,#0x400             ;2449
00007e  a802              ADD      r0,sp,#8              ;2449
000080  9b01              LDR      r3,[sp,#4]            ;2449
000082  f8dd2418          LDR      r2,[sp,#0x418]        ;2449
000086  f7fffffe          BL       Uart_vsnprintf
00008a  4606              MOV      r6,r0                 ;2449
00008c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;2450
00008e  9001              STR      r0,[sp,#4]            ;2450
000090  2500              MOVS     r5,#0                 ;2455
000092  e006              B        |L82.162|
                  |L82.148|
000094  a802              ADD      r0,sp,#8              ;2458
000096  1941              ADDS     r1,r0,r5              ;2458
000098  2201              MOVS     r2,#1                 ;2458
00009a  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;2458
00009c  f7fffffe          BL       USARTx_send_bytes
0000a0  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1              ;2455
                  |L82.162|
0000a2  42b5              CMP      r5,r6                 ;2455
0000a4  dbf6              BLT      |L82.148|
0000a6  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]            ;2463
0000a8  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;2463
0000aa  d102              BNE      |L82.178|
0000ac  f7fffffe          BL       Uart1_xSemaphoreGive
0000b0  e00c              B        |L82.204|
                  |L82.178|

0000b6  d102              BNE      |L82.190|
0000b8  f7fffffe          BL       Uart2_xSemaphoreGive
0000bc  e006              B        |L82.204|
                  |L82.190|

0000c2  d102              BNE      |L82.202|
0000c4  f7fffffe          BL       Uart3_xSemaphoreGive
0000c8  e000              B        |L82.204|
                  |L82.202|
0000ca  bf00              NOP                            ;2492
                  |L82.204|
0000cc  4630              MOV      r0,r6                 ;2495
0000ce  e7a0              B        |L82.18|
;;;2497   #endif  //#if (_ENABLE_CHIP_MS1826 == _MACRO_ENABLE)
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.return_com_multiple||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  return_com_multiple PROC
;;;382    
;;;383    UINT16 return_com_multiple(UINT16 u16dat, UINT8 u8_data)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;384    {
000002  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;385    	UINT16 u16_con_mult;
;;;386    	if(u16dat % (8 * u8_data) != 0)
000004  00c8              LSLS     r0,r1,#3
000006  fb92f4f0          SDIV     r4,r2,r0
00000a  fb002014          MLS      r0,r0,r4,r2
00000e  b138              CBZ      r0,|L83.32|
;;;387    	{
;;;388    		u16_con_mult = u16dat / (8 * u8_data) * (8 * u8_data);
000010  00c8              LSLS     r0,r1,#3
000012  fb92f0f0          SDIV     r0,r2,r0
000016  00cc              LSLS     r4,r1,#3
000018  4360              MULS     r0,r4,r0
00001a  b283              UXTH     r3,r0
;;;389    		return u16_con_mult;
00001c  4618              MOV      r0,r3
                  |L83.30|
;;;390    	}
;;;391    	else
;;;392    		return u16dat;
;;;393    }
00001e  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L83.32|
000020  4610              MOV      r0,r2                 ;392
000022  e7fc              B        |L83.30|
;;;394    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.return_minof_three||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  return_minof_three PROC
;;;373    
;;;374    UINT16 return_minof_three(UINT16 u16dat1, UINT16 u16dat2, UINT16 u16dat3)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;375    {
000002  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;376    	UINT16 u16min = (u16dat1 >= u16dat2) ? u16dat2 : u16dat1;
000004  428b              CMP      r3,r1
000006  db01              BLT      |L84.12|
000008  460c              MOV      r4,r1
00000a  e000              B        |L84.14|
                  |L84.12|
00000c  461c              MOV      r4,r3
                  |L84.14|
00000e  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;377    
;;;378    	u16min = (u16min >= u16dat3) ? u16dat3 : u16min;
000010  4290              CMP      r0,r2
000012  db01              BLT      |L84.24|
000014  4614              MOV      r4,r2
000016  e000              B        |L84.26|
                  |L84.24|
000018  4604              MOV      r4,r0
                  |L84.26|
00001a  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;379    
;;;380    	return u16min;
;;;381    }
00001c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;382    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.video_ms1826_reset||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  video_ms1826_reset PROC
;;;720    
;;;721    BOOL video_ms1826_reset(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_dis_cur, UINT8 u8_dis_bak)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;722    {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
000006  4616              MOV      r6,r2
;;;723        MS1826_CHipReset(u8Dev);
000008  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       MS1826_CHipReset
;;;724        switch(u8_dis_cur)
00000e  2c05              CMP      r4,#5
000010  d215              BCS      |L85.62|
000012  e8dff004          TBB      [pc,r4]
000016  0307              DCB      0x03,0x07
000018  0b100c00          DCB      0x0b,0x10,0x0c,0x00
;;;725        {
;;;726            case MS1826_VIDEO_SPLITTER:
;;;727    //            if(u8_dis_bak == MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER
;;;728    //                ||u8_dis_bak == MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER_OUT)
;;;729                {
;;;730                    video_process_cfg(u8Dev);
00001c  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       video_process_cfg
;;;731                }
;;;732    			break;
000022  e00c              B        |L85.62|
;;;733            case MS1826_VIDEO_SPLICER:
;;;734    //            if(u8_dis_bak == MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER
;;;735    //                ||u8_dis_bak == MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER_OUT)
;;;736                {
;;;737                    video_process_cfg(u8Dev);
000024  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000026  f7fffffe          BL       video_process_cfg
;;;738                }
;;;739    			break;
00002a  e008              B        |L85.62|
;;;740            case MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER:
;;;741            case MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER_OUT:
00002c  bf00              NOP      
;;;742                video_process_cfg(u8Dev);
00002e  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000030  f7fffffe          BL       video_process_cfg
;;;743    			break;
000034  e003              B        |L85.62|
;;;744            case MS1826_BYPASS_MATRIX_SWITCHER:
;;;745    //            if(u8_dis_bak == MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER
;;;746    //                ||u8_dis_bak == MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER_OUT)
;;;747                {
;;;748                    video_process_cfg(u8Dev);
000036  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000038  f7fffffe          BL       video_process_cfg
;;;749                }
;;;750    			break;
00003c  bf00              NOP      
                  |L85.62|
00003e  bf00              NOP                            ;732
;;;751    
;;;752        }
;;;753        return MS_TRUE;
000040  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;754    }
000042  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;755    
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||.constdata||, DATA, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  g_u8_rx_idx
000000  00010203          DCB      0x00,0x01,0x02,0x03
                  g_u8_csc_idx
000004  00010203          DCB      0x00,0x01,0x02,0x03
                  g_u8_misc_module_rx
000008  10111213          DCB      0x10,0x11,0x12,0x13
                  g_u8_4ksdn_idx

                  g_u8_sdn_idx

                  g_u8_dsc_idx
000014  00010203          DCB      0x00,0x01,0x02,0x03
                  g_u8_dma_idx
000018  01030507          DCB      0x01,0x03,0x05,0x07
                  g_u8_dma_dsc_idx
00001c  00020406          DCB      0x00,0x02,0x04,0x06
                  g_u8_misc_module_vipss
000020  00010203          DCB      0x00,0x01,0x02,0x03
                  g_u8_misc_module_vopss
000024  2c2d2e2f          DCB      0x2c,0x2d,0x2e,0x2f
                  g_u8_su_idx
